# PLAN — Layer D: operated end-to-end autopilot service (rcm pilot) · summary

_Generated heuristically (no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY). For higher quality summaries, set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY._

- `startRun(vertical, {mode})` → runs to the first gate, persists, returns run (`status: 'awaiting-app
- `getRun(id)`, `listRuns({status})`, `pendingGates()`.
- `approve(id, who, note)` → resumes past the gate, executes remaining steps incl. the irreversible
- `reject(id, who, note)` → `status: 'rejected'`, no write happens.
- a gate ∈ `approvedGates` → recorded `approved`, run continues (no pause);

- **Full doc:** docs/plans/PLAN-layer-d-operated-service.md
